field_values.action_summary: Carter notices suspicious movement in the valley. Suspecting an ambush, he pursues the trail and discovers a large Apache camp on a plateau, leading to a chaotic skirmish.
field_values.camera_intent: POV shots of valley movement; Wide shots of Apache camp; Handheld/shaky cam for combat; Medium shots of character engagement
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Direction of pursuit from valley to plateau
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the physical threat of the Apache presence through a transition from quiet observation to high-intensity combat. The sequence must move from the valley floor up to the plateau, escalating tension via movement detection and culminating in a chaotic skirmish.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- apache_warriors

## Required Environments
- arizona_gold_vein_claim (valley, trail, plateau)

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact count of apache_warriors
- Direction of pursuit from valley to plateau
- Weapon handling (rifles and sidearms)

## Beat List
- BT001: Detection of movement in the valley
- BT002: Pursuit and discovery of the camp
- BT003: The skirmish
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
